title: [Proposal] Prevent duplicate task_complete notes in background finalization loop
prompt:

Do NOT use find_replace, replace_lines, create_file, or write_file for src/ paths — those
resolve to workspace, not src/, and will FAIL with "file not found". Use ONLY:
  • read_source(file, start_line?, num_lines?)               — read src/ file
  • list_source(path?)                                       — list src/ dir
  • grep_source(pattern, path?)                              — search src/
  • find_replace_source(file, find, replace)                 — text swap
  • replace_lines_source(file, start_line, end_line, new_content) — line edit

  • delete_lines_source(file, start_line, end_line)          — delete lines
TITLE: Prevent duplicate task_complete notes in background finalization loop
PRIORITY: high
TYPE: src_edit
SUMMARY: Add deterministic safeguards so background tasks cannot append multiple task_complete intraday notes when the final write_note_completion step is re-run. The patch introduces idempotent write_note behavior for task_complete and auto-step advancement for the final step when completion is already logged.
FULL IMPLEMENTATION PLAN:
## Why this change
- Users are seeing duplicate completion notes for a single task run (multiple `[task_complete]` entries written seconds apart) even when the task ultimately succeeds.
- Source evidence shows the final background step is `write_note_completion` and is instruction-driven:
  - `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` lines 188-210 append a mandatory final step requiring `write_note(tag:"task_complete")`.
  - `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` lines 653-673 repeatedly prompt the model to call `write_note`, then final text, then `step_complete`.
  - `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` lines 750-776 continue looping when step index does not advance.
- The `write_note` tool currently appends blindly with no idempotency guard:
  - `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts` lines 1952-1989 always append to intraday file and append a `write_note` journal entry for task sessions.
- Therefore, if the model executes `write_note` but misses `step_complete` in that round, subsequent rounds on the same final step re-run `write_note`, causing duplicate `[task_complete]` notes.

## Exact source edits
- `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts` (around current `case 'write_note'`, lines ~1952-1989):
  - Add a task-session idempotency check specifically for `noteTag === 'task_complete'`.
  - Resolve taskId from `sessionId` (`task_<id>`), load task record/journal from task store.
  - If a prior journal entry exists with `type === 'write_note'` and content prefix `[task_complete]` (case-insensitive), do **not** append another intraday note.
  - Return a successful no-op result such as: `write_note: task_complete already recorded for this task; skipped duplicate.`
  - Keep existing behavior unchanged for all other tags (`error`, `run_insight`, `summary`, etc.).

- `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` (final-step round handling, around lines ~750-776):
  - Add a small helper check after round completion when current step is `notes === 'write_note_completion'` and step did not advance.
  - Read latest task journal; if current task already contains a `write_note` entry for `[task_complete]`, auto-complete current step via `mutatePlan({ op:'complete', step_index: currentStepIndex, notes:'auto-complete: task_complete already logged' })` and increment `currentStepIndex` deterministically.
  - Append journal status note indicating automatic final-step advancement occurred due to existing completion note.
  - Continue loop so normal terminal completion branch (`currentStepIndex >= plan.length`) delivers final summary once.

- `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` (final-step re-prompt copy near lines ~667-673):
  - Tighten wording for repeat final-step rounds:
    - If task_complete already exists, instruct: “Do NOT call write_note again; call step_complete now.”
    - Otherwise keep current 3-step instruction order.
  - This is guidance-only; deterministic protection remains in code paths above.

## Deterministic behavior after patch
- Happy path:
  - Final step calls `write_note(tag:"task_complete")` once, writes final text, calls `step_complete`, task completes as before.
- Missed-step_complete path (current bug):
  - First `write_note(task_complete)` writes normally.
  - Any subsequent `write_note(task_complete)` in same task becomes successful no-op (no duplicate file append).
  - Runner detects existing completion note on final step and auto-advances step even if model forgets `step_complete`.
  - Task exits cleanly with one completion note.
- Non-final or non-task contexts:
  - No behavior change for interactive chat (write_note stripped there already) or non-`task_complete` tags.
- Explicit non-changes:
  - No changes to proposal approval flow, task creation, step_complete tool contract, or schedule job semantics.

## Acceptance tests
1. Repro regression test (proposal/background task):
   - Run a background task that reaches final step.
   - Simulate/force a round where model calls `write_note(tag:"task_complete")` but not `step_complete`.
   - Verify intraday notes file contains exactly one new `[task_complete]` entry for that task.
2. Duplicate-call test:
   - In same task session, call `write_note(tag:"task_complete")` twice.
   - First call appends; second returns duplicate-skip message and does not append.
3. Auto-advance final step test:
   - With final step active and prior `[task_complete]` journal present, run another round without `step_complete`.
   - Verify plan step is marked done automatically and `currentStepIndex` advances.
4. Non-task_complete safety test:
   - In task session, call `write_note(tag:"error")` multiple times; all should append normally.
5. Build/typecheck:
   - `npm run build` must pass.

## Risks and compatibility
- Risk: Over-broad dedupe could suppress legitimate notes.
  - Mitigation: dedupe applies only to `task_complete` tag and only within the same `task_<id>` session/journal scope.
- Risk: Auto-completing final step might hide incomplete final chat summary text.
  - Mitigation: runner still uses `lastResultSummary` / `finalSummary` fallback path; add clear journal note when auto-advance occurs for observability.
- Backward compatibility:
  - Existing tasks, proposals, schedules remain compatible.
  - No schema or API contract changes required.


AFFECTED FILES:
  - [edit] src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts: Add idempotency guard for write_note(tag=task_complete) in task sessions to prevent duplicate intraday writes.
  - [edit] src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts: Auto-advance final write_note_completion step when task_complete note already exists; tighten final-step repeat instructions.


DIFF PREVIEW / REFERENCE:
```
// subagent-executor.ts (write_note case)
if (isTaskSession && noteTag.toLowerCase() === 'task_complete') {
  // inspect task journal for existing [task_complete] write_note
  // if found: return success no-op and skip fs.appendFileSync
}

// background-task-runner.ts (after round when step didn't advance)
if (isWriteNoteStep && hasTaskCompleteWriteNote(taskId)) {
  mutatePlan(taskId, [{ op: 'complete', step_index: liveTask.currentStepIndex, notes: 'auto-complete: task_complete already logged' }]);
  // set currentStepIndex = +1, save, append status_push
  continue;
}

// background-task-runner.ts (final-step prompt)
// if task_complete already logged: "Do NOT call write_note again; call step_complete now."
```

EXPECTED IMPACT: Eliminates duplicate completion notes for single tasks, reduces final-step loop churn, and makes task finalization deterministic under model variance.

BUILD REQUIRED: Yes — run npm run build after edits. MANDATORY. Stop if build fails — task will pause for assistance.
INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Read affected files with read_source first to understand current state.
2. Apply edits using find_replace_source (preferred) or replace_lines_source.
3. Run: run_command({command:"npm run build", shell:true}). If it fails, STOP — do not retry.
4. Report exactly what was changed and any issues encountered.
ADDITIONAL EXECUTOR INSTRUCTIONS:
Implement the proposal exactly as specified:
1) Edit src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts write_note tool path to make tag=task_complete idempotent per task session (no duplicate append).
2) Edit src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts to auto-advance write_note_completion when a task_complete note already exists and step did not advance.
3) Update final-step repeat prompt text to prevent duplicate write_note calls.
4) Run npm run build.
5) Report changed line ranges and verification results.

journal.detail: Executed approved proposal prop_1774492902395_3bdd8e to prevent duplicate background-task completion notes. Source edits completed in two files using src edit tools only. (1) src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts: updated case 'write_note' to add task-session idempotency for tag task_complete. For task_* sessions, it now loads the task record and checks journal entries for an existing write_note content prefix matching [task_complete] (case-insensitive). If found, it returns a successful no-op message and skips intraday append + duplicate journal write. Other note tags remain unchanged and still append normally. (2) src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts: added final-step prompt branching and deterministic auto-advance behavior. Prompt now detects whether a task_complete write_note already exists: if yes, it explicitly instructs not to call write_note again and to call step_complete; otherwise it preserves the normal 3-step finalization order (write_note, final text, step_complete). After each round when step index did not advance, added safeguard for write_note_completion steps: if journal already contains [task_complete] write_note, runner marks the step complete via mutatePlan(notes='auto-complete: task_complete already logged'), increments currentStepIndex, saves task, appends status_push journal note, broadcasts task_step_done, and continues loop. Verification: npm run build executed twice and both builds passed (tsc exit 0). No build errors encountered.

finalSummary: Implemented and verified. ### Changed files - `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts` (around lines **1952–2009**) - Added `write_note` idempotency guard for task sessions when `tag === "task_complete"`. - It now checks the current task journal for an existing `write_note` entry with `[task_complete]` prefix (case-insensitive). - If found, it returns a successful no-op: - `write_note: task_complete already recorded for this task; skipped duplicate.` - Non-`task_complete` tags are unchanged. - `src/gateway/tasks/background-task-runner.ts` - Updated final-step prompt logic (around lines **653–701**): - If task-complete note already exists: instructs **“Do NOT call write_note again; call step_complete now.”** - Otherwise preserves original 3-step finalization order. - Added deterministic auto-advance on non-advanced final step (around lines **771–816**): - When current step is `write_note_completion` and journal already has `[task_complete]`, - marks step complete via `mutatePlan(... notes: 'auto-complete: task_complete already logged')` - increments `currentStepIndex` - appends status journal note - broadcasts step-done event - continues loop cleanly. ### Build / verification - Ran `npm run build` twice (as requested by plan steps). - Both passed: `tsc` exit `0`. - No issues encountered.
